description_long: This is a modern, single-seat armchair upholstered in a soft, muted pink fabric. The chair features a wide, deep seat cushion and a slightly reclined, tufted backrest with subtle button detailing. Its armrests are thick, gently sloped, and fully padded, providing ample comfort and support. The overall silhouette is rounded and inviting, with smooth, continuous curves from the backrest to the arms. The chair stands on four short, slightly angled legs, likely made of dark wood or metal. The upholstery appears to be a solid color with a matte finish, and the visible seams and tufting add a touch of sophistication.
description: A modern pink upholstered armchair with tufted backrest, wide padded arms, and short angled legs. The design is rounded, comfortable, and visually inviting.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the tufted backrest, deep seat cushion, and thick, sloped armrests.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the seat depth, armrest padding, and button-tufted backrest.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the smooth, continuous back and the subtle seam lines.
description_view_3: Rear-right view emphasizing the rounded backrest and the angled legs.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, thick and gently sloped
attribute_backrest_style: medium-high, tufted and rounded with button detailing
attribute_leg_type: short, slightly angled, likely wooden or metal legs
